answers: Ancient civilizations, World Wars, Industrial Revolution. Learn from the past!
History highlights: ancient civilisations (Egypt, Rome, China), World Wars I and II, the Industrial Revolution, and the Cold War shaped the modern world.
Christopher Columbus reached the Americas in 1492, though indigenous peoples lived there for thousands of years before. History is always more complex than it seems.
WW2 (1939-1945) involved over 30 countries and caused 70-85 million deaths. Understanding history helps us avoid repeating its mistakes.

feelings.question: when was world war 2?
feelings.answer:
Great question! WW2 (1939-1945) involved over 30 countries and caused 70-85 million deaths. Understanding history helps us avoid repeating its mistakes.
